candidates.why: Direct revenue line with populated values; preferable to header/subtotal rows like 'Revenues' or 'Revenue from Business Activities - Total'.
Revenue subtotal/total, but less preferred than the direct operating revenue line.
Section/header row rather than the populated revenue amount line.

variables.notes: Used priority list for possible label changes over time; both are valid revenue labels, with the direct line preferred over the total/subtotal.

candidates.why: Best semantic match for direct cost of sales/cost of revenue; populated and not a header.
Also a valid COGS-style total, but less preferred than the direct operating revenue cost line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Alternate total label for cost of revenue, but less primary than 'Cost of Operating Revenue'.
Could be used if one wanted to exclude depreciation, but standard COGS is usually the reported cost of revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost-of-revenue line rather than subtotal duplicates. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Cost of Operating Revenue

candidates.why: Best overhead component row from candidates; populated and excludes D&A-specific subline. It appears to be the SG&A bucket excluding separately disclosed R&D and other minor SG&A items.
Separate R&D line appears above EBIT. Because selected SG&A row appears to exclude R&D, include this also in XSGA so XSGA-XRD properly removes it.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A ex-R&D line, but the unclassified SG&A line is preferred and numerically aligns with the SG&A total bridge.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A component rows exist.

variables.notes: Included separate R&D in XSGA because the selected SG&A row appears to exclude it: SG&A Total approximately equals Unclassified + Research & Development Expense + depreciation/other items.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
Supplemental duplicate of the main R&D line; lower priority than the primary income statement row.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental total; lower priority than the main reported expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental

variables.notes: Primary choice is the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. Supplemental rows included only as lower-priority fallbacks if naming changes across years.

candidates.why: Most semantically direct interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Strong alternative interest expense label; likely the underlying primary reported line in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Lease-interest subset only, so not preferred for total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Appears empty and narrower/less reliable than the main interest expense rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used priority list of single reported interest expense labels; excluded lease-interest subset because it is not total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per rule to prefer parent/owner equity.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent equity label and good fallback if primary label changes.
Also appears equivalent here, but slightly less explicit than parent-attributable equity.
Alternative common equity label in the Other section; viable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Too broad because it explicitly includes minority interest and hybrid debt; not preferred when parent equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Not appropriate for MIB because it is a total equity line, not a standalone non-controlling interest row.
Income statement line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Income statement line, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interests balance-sheet row is present. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, set MIB to empty.
